problem_text_cn: 1441 空气中声速的测量。[可供仪器和用具] 示波器、低频信号发生器、超声波声速测量仪、三通接头（电分配器）、同轴电缆数根。[要求] (1) 写出有关公式。(2) 写出简要的实验步骤。(3) 多次测量求平均值。
problem_text_en: 1441 Measurement of sound velocity in air. [Available instruments and tools] Oscilloscope, low-frequency signal generator, ultrasonic sound velocity measuring instrument, three-way connector (electric distributor), several coaxial cables. [Requirements] (1) Write down the relevant formulas. (2) Write down the brief experimental steps. (3) Take multiple measurements and find the average value.
img_cn: 图1441_1：空气中声速测量实验装置示意图
图1441_2：共振干涉法测量数据及结果
图1441_3：相位法测量数据及结果
img_en: Fig. 1441_1: Schematic diagram of experimental device for measuring sound velocity in air
Fig. 1441_2: Resonance interference method measurement data and results
Fig. 1441_3: Phase method measurement data and results
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】共振干涉法：保持频率$f$不变，测相邻接收信号极大值时接收面间距$\lambda/2$，得波长$\lambda$，声速$v = f \cdot \lambda$；相位比较法：相位差$\varphi = \omega t = 2\pi l/\lambda$，当$\varphi$改变$\pi$时，距离$l$改变$\lambda/2$，得$\lambda$后求$v$。代入数据：共振干涉法$f = 35669.4\ \mathrm{Hz}$，$\lambda = 0.9591\ \mathrm{cm}$，$v_1 = 342.1\ \mathrm{m/s}$；相位法$f = 35669\ \mathrm{Hz}$，$\lambda = 0.9608\ \mathrm{cm}$，$v_2 = 342.7\ \mathrm{m/s}$。温度$\theta = 14.8\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，公认值$v = 340.31\ \mathrm{m/s}$，两种方法不确定度 < 1%。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Resonance interference method: Keep frequency $f$ constant, measure the distance $\lambda/2$ between receiving surfaces when adjacent received signals reach maximum values, get wavelength $\lambda$, sound velocity $v = f \cdot \lambda$; Phase comparison method: Phase difference $\varphi = \omega t = 2\pi l/\lambda$, when $\varphi$ changes by $\pi$, distance $l$ changes by $\lambda/2$, get $\lambda$ and then find $v$. Substituting data: Resonance interference method $f = 35669.4\ \mathrm{Hz}$, $\lambda = 0.9591\ \mathrm{cm}$, $v_1 = 342.1\ \mathrm{m/s}$; Phase method $f = 35669\ \mathrm{Hz}$, $\lambda = 0.9608\ \mathrm{cm}$, $v_2 = 342.7\ \mathrm{m/s}$. Temperature $\theta = 14.8\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, accepted value $v = 340.31\ \mathrm{m/s}$, uncertainty of both methods < 1%.
problem_answer: 声速公式：$\boldsymbol{v = f \cdot \lambda}$；共振干涉法声速：$\boldsymbol{342.1\ \mathrm{m/s}}$；相位法声速：$\boldsymbol{342.7\ \mathrm{m/s}}$；与公认值不确定度 < 1%；测量关键：调节共振频率，逐差法处理数据。
